source.title: Build a custom RAG agent with LangGraph

questions: In the preprocess documents step, what source material does the tutorial fetch for retrieval?
Compare the direct-answer path with the retriever-tool path and explain where document grading and question rewrite sit in the workflow.
What happens if the search results look weird or low quality?
Compare the normal answer path with the recovery path after low-quality retrieval, including grading and question rewrite.
